name: workflow
description: Dynamic multi-agent workflows for Claude Code — fan out subagents at scale and return only the final result. Ships /evolve (inventory the repo, plan and apply skill/subagent/hook/plugin/MCP changes) and /deep-review (multi-lens diff review → validate → optional auto-fix) and /onboard (interview the operator and generate a committed project orchestrator that each user opts into locally via settings.local.json).
